MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description file for software directory submission.

Program_Info.Program_System_Requirements: macOS 11.5 or later; foobar2000 for Mac; Last.fm account for scrobbling.

English.Keywords: foobar2000, Last.fm, scrobbler, scrobbling, macOS, Apple Silicon, audio, plugin, music, now playing
English.Char_Desc_45: Last.fm scrobbler for foobar2000 on macOS
English.Char_Desc_80: Native Last.fm scrobbler plugin for foobar2000 on macOS.
English.Char_Desc_250: Foo Scrobbler for Mac is a native Last.fm scrobbling plugin for foobar2000 on macOS. It submits played tracks using precise playback rules, supports Now Playing updates, offline caching, dynamic streams, and one-time Last.fm authentication.
English.Char_Desc_450: Foo Scrobbler for Mac is a lightweight native Last.fm scrobbling plugin for foobar2000 on macOS. It submits played tracks only after meaningful playback, sends Now Playing updates, caches scrobbles when offline, and resumes submission automatically. It also supports dynamic streams, regex and Title Formatting filters, strict metadata validation, and clear console logging.
English.Char_Desc_2000: Foo Scrobbler for Mac is a native Last.fm scrobbling component for foobar2000 on macOS. It is built specifically for foobar2000 for Mac and integrates directly with the player without wrappers or compatibility layers. The component submits tracks to Last.fm according to precise playback rules, avoiding malformed, premature, or duplicate submissions. It supports Now Playing notifications, automatic offline caching, retry handling, dynamic sources such as radio streams, Unicode-aware filtering, regular expression exclusions, and foobar2000 Title Formatting for input fields and filters. Authentication is performed once through the Last.fm website, after which the component runs quietly in the background. Preferences are available under Tools -> Foo Scrobbler, while console logging reports meaningful internal scrobbling actions. Foo Scrobbler is open-source software released under the MIT License and supports macOS 11.5 or later on both Intel and Apple Silicon Macs.

Permissions.Distribution_Permissions: Foo Scrobbler for Mac may be freely distributed as long as the original package is not modified and the license terms are preserved.
Permissions.EULA: Foo Scrobbler for Mac is released under the MIT License. See the LICENSE file in the project repository for full license terms.
